problem: Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach?
mechanism: Biochar amendment for soil carbon sequestration
hypothesis: If Biochar amendment for soil carbon sequestration is applied to what, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Life cycle assessment with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
